final:
module RefModule(
    input D,
    input CLK,
    output reg Q  // Change to reg to hold state
);wire GATE_N;

    assign GATE_N = ~CLK;

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        Q <= D;  // Use a simple always block to implement the D flip-flop
    end

endmodule
